Petition For Preliminary Distribution Of Portion Of Estate Administered Under Independent Admin. Of Estates Act
Off Calendar Apr-25-2012 Granted Per Written Order

Interim Petition For Allowance Of Extraordinary Compensation For Attorney
Off Calendar Aug-08-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Henry appeared by telephone for Richard Henry. Matthew Mraule for Myers Urbatsch, P.C. (Petitioner).

Mr. Henry waived notice of the additional request for costs. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the fee request. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-09-2011 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-26-2011 Continued To Feb-09-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Continued To Jan-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch for Chris DelMonico.

Mr. Urbatsch appeared for the purpose of requesting a continuance, stated that he would file the amended petition and that the the Special Letters needed to be extended. The matter was continued to January 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Appointment Of Special Administrator
Off Calendar Nov-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
